title: daiswa delavayi
intro: Daiswa delavayi, also known as Himalayan Daiswa, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and is a member of the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Daiswa delavayi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
